19.reason: [BFS should mark nodes as visited when enqueued, not dequeued, to prevent duplicate queue entries and incorrect traversal order]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Marking visited on dequeue instead of enqueue can cause multiple enqueues of the same vertex, potentially affecting BFS order and queue size.
